title: crotalaria paulitschkei
intro: Crotalaria paulitschkei, also known as a species of flowering plant in the legume family, is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to be used as a purgative and anthelmintic, helping to remove parasites and toxins from the body. Crotalaria paulitschkei is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Crotalaria paulitschkei include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water.
